# Tecovirimat 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tecovirimat 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tecovirimat</strong> 目前有 <strong>27 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tecovirimat 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Tecovirimat SIGA is indicated for the treatment of the following viral infections in adults and children with body weight at least 13 kg:  Smallpox Monkeypox Cowpox  Tecovirimat SIGA is also...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>smallpox（99.7%）</li>
<li>cowpox（99.7%）</li>
<li>contagious pustular dermatitis（99.7%）</li>
<li>milker's nodule（99.7%）</li>
<li>hordeolum（99.7%）</li>
<li>vibrio infectious disease（99.7%）</li>
<li>Klebsiella infectious disease（99.6%）</li>
<li>noma（99.6%）</li>
<li>Newcastle disease（99.6%）</li>
<li>Proteus infectious disease（99.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/tecovirimat/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
